title: MikroTik ATL 5G R16
description: The ATL 5G R16 by MikroTik is a high-performance outdoor device with support for 5G and LTE Cat 20 , designed to deliver maximum performance even in demanding conditions. Thanks to its high-gain 16 dBi antenna and 4x4 MIMO technology, the ATL is an ideal solution for connectivity even in the most remote locations. The device features a modern dual-core ARM processor, 512 MB of RAM, and RouterOS v7 for full network management control. It includes a Gigabit Ethernet port with PoE-in support… The ATL 5G R16 features a dual SIM system â use either a standard microSIM or the built-in eSIM . The eSIM can be easily activated via MikroTik Connectivity , enabling instant access to mobile data without waiting for a physical SIM card or operator activation With its IP66-rated enclosure , the device is protected against harsh weather conditions, and its aerodynamic design prevents the accumulation of snow and water â making it an ideal choice for challenging outdoor environments ATL 5G R16 device PoE injector 24V / 0.8A power adapter Metal mounting clamp
